description: This is a shell script that performs an end-to-end smoke test for an orchestration API. It creates a document, attaches extracted text, triggers an orchestration run, polls for build status, and fetches the orchestration record to verify success.

methods.name: have_jq
methods.description: Checks if the 'jq' command-line JSON processor is available.

methods.name: require_cmd
methods.description: Checks if a required command-line tool is available and exits if not.

methods.name: c
methods.description: Wraps curl with default options for silent operation and JSON content type.

methods.name: json_get
methods.description: Extracts specific fields from JSON strings using jq or a fallback Python parser.
